title: ISO 42001 Statement of Applicability section
description: Structured output of the draft_iso42001_soa_section tool. Mirrors the exact contract in prompts/iso42001_soa_prompt.txt.

soa_sections.description: One Statement of Applicability entry per control, in the order the controls were given.

control_reference.description: The Annex A control reference, e.g. 'A.6.2.4'.

control_title.description: The Annex A control title, or the control as given if unknown.

applicability_decision.description: Whether the control applies to the AI system described.

justification.description: A 2 to 4 sentence narrative explaining the applicability decision.

implementation_status.description: The drafted implementation status for the organization to confirm.

evidence_pointer.description: The type of evidence that would demonstrate the control; describes the expected artifact, does not assert it exists.
